summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx to implement the required navigation changes. Based on the file summary and partial diff content, the implementation appears to address all four requirements: removing Social Media link, removing standalone Login link, adding a golden yellow Sign Up dropdown button with Login option, and restructuring the desktop layout. The Navigation.tsx file summary explicitly confirms the key features are present.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'secondaryLinks' array containing a 'Grievance' link was added to Navigation.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding or modifying the Grievance link in the navigation. The requirements only cover removing Social Media and Login, and adding the Sign Up dropdown. Its presence in the component is not requested by any requirement.
